doc.id: Potkay et al. - 2022 - Turgor-limited predictions of tree growth, height and metabolic scaling over tree lifespans 1.pdf
doc.title: Turgor-limited predictions of tree growth, height, and metabolic scaling over tree lifespans (Supporting Information)

model_card.name: Supporting Information References
task: Provide source citations supporting PTM, TDGM, and THORP-G model derivations.

limitations.text: This chunk contains only the bibliography (References) and introduces no new model equations, parameters, or algorithms beyond what was defined in earlier sections (S.1–S.3).

implementation.model_scope: Bibliography for the Supporting Information model descriptions (PTM, TDGM, and THORP-G).

provenance.notes:
This chunk covers the Supporting Information 'References' section (PDF pages 31–36). No additional model equations or algorithm definitions appear after S.3; remaining content is a bibliography.
